name: Stardew Valley
description: Parses Stardew Valley 1.6 save files into structured game state
limitations: Directory-based save discovery requires daemon enhancement (pending)

crop_planner.name: Crop Planner
crop_planner.description: Look up crop growth data, profitability, fertilizer effects, and artisan goods values. Use 'crop' for a specific crop's full analysis, or 'season' for all crops ranked by gold/day.

crop.description: Crop name for forward lookup (e.g. 'Pumpkin', 'Starfruit'). Returns growth time, seasons, sell prices, gold/day, and artisan goods values.

season.description: Season name for reverse lookup ('Spring', 'Summer', 'Fall', 'Winter'). Returns all crops for that season ranked by gold/day.

gift_preferences.name: Gift Preferences
gift_preferences.description: Look up NPC gift preferences by villager name or item name. Includes universal and personal taste data from Stardew Valley 1.6.

item.description: Item name for reverse lookup (e.g. 'Diamond', 'Pumpkin', 'Prismatic Shard'). Returns which NPCs love/like/dislike/hate it.

npc.description: NPC name for forward lookup (e.g. 'Abigail', 'Sebastian'). Returns loved/liked/disliked/hated items.
